svg.title: Flyte + Kafka full pipeline with inter-stage publishing
svg.desc: Complete VKIS pipeline: Kafka consumer triggers a Flyte workflow, tasks run as Kubernetes pods, results are written to storage, and a result handler publishes to the next Kafka topic — repeating across all 7 stages.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers the VKIS pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the VKIS crawl stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the vkis-ingest-consumer do?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the CrawlTask Flyte pod?')
sendPrompt('Where does the crawl stage write its output?')
sendPrompt('What does the VKIS parse stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the parse consumer do?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the ParseTask Flyte pod?')
sendPrompt('Where does the parse stage write markdown?')
sendPrompt('What does the page index stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the pageindex consumer do?')
sendPrompt('What does PageIndexTask do inside its pod?')
sendPrompt('Where are page sections stored?')
sendPrompt('What does the ontology stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the ontology consumer do?')
sendPrompt('What LLM does the ontology task use?')
sendPrompt('Where are ontology tags stored?')
sendPrompt('How does the embedding stage work in Flyte?')
sendPrompt('What does the embedding consumer do?')
sendPrompt('What model is used for embeddings?')
sendPrompt('Where are embeddings stored?')
sendPrompt('What does the QA generation stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the qagen consumer do?')
sendPrompt('How are Q&A pairs generated?')
sendPrompt('Where are QA pairs stored?')
sendPrompt('What does the index upsert stage do?')
sendPrompt('What does the index upsert consumer do?')
sendPrompt('How does Flyte upsert to Azure AI Search?')
sendPrompt('What Azure AI Search index does VKIS use?')
